_meta.title: ODCF / Orbital Risk Score — core parameter library
_meta.status: Stage 1. Confidently-sourced constants filled; empirical layers (spatial density) rebuild from the catalogue via build_parameters.py.

source_key.NASA_SBM: NASA Standard Breakup Model, Johnson et al. 2001 (EVOLVE 4.0)
source_key.ORDEM: NASA Orbital Debris Engineering Model (material/density categories)
source_key.EMPIRICAL: Computed from the merged DISCOS + Space-Track catalogue

ors_formula.constraint: w_DGP + w_OPI + w_CPF = 1; DGP, OPI, CPF each normalized to [0,1]

default_weights.note: Early-phase default. PAPER proposes high OPI weight (~0.5) to enforce the 25-year disposal guideline. Weights are policy levers.

catastrophic_collision_threshold.definition: impact energy-to-mass ratio >= 40 J/g => catastrophic full fragmentation

variables.Mtot: catastrophic: combined mass (kg); non-catastrophic: m_proj*v_impact^2 kg-equiv

fragment_count_collision.verified: confirmed verbatim in 'A parametric simulation of a spacecraft fragmentation' (Nf = 0.1 Me^0.75 Lc^-1.71, Me in kg, Lc in m)

orbital_persistence_index.basis: orbital lifetime from King-Hele atmospheric decay; longer lifetime => higher OPI

drivers.ballistic_coefficient: B = m/(Cd*A); OPI increasing in B

atmospheric_density_model.model: piecewise-exponential (Vallado); Jacchia optional for high-fidelity pass

orbital_persistence_index.shortcut: DISCOS predDecayDate gives a direct predicted-lifetime signal for many objects
orbital_persistence_index.normalization: lifetime -> [0,1], log-scaled (lifetimes span years to millennia)

collision_probability_factor.basis: spatial density / flux of the object's orbital shell

spatial_density_table.validation: reproduces literature ~800 km debris peak AND reveals modern ~475-550 km payload peak
spatial_density_table.augmentation: can be scaled by ORDEM/MASTER small-debris flux later

contribution_formula.expression: C_i = ( sum_j ORS_ij / sum_over_all_objects ORS ) * TotalAnnualFundTarget

variables.ORS_ij: ORS of object j owned by operator i
variables.TotalAnnualFundTarget: set annually (admin + claims reserve + ADR budget)
